constraint: No critical findings should be reported. A few cleanup-tier findings (e.g. A6_field_missing for radford2019language having no DOI) are acceptable, but the report must NOT raise A1, A4, A5, A7, B_OFF_TOPIC, or B_WRONG_DIRECTION on any of these three entries.

false_positive_traps.rationale: OpenAlex Blog entry — must NOT be flagged A4_unresolved just because it's not a peer-reviewed venue
